cases.name: workflow
cases.src:
Module test.wf.

Rule process, produce Text:
  Start task as async fetch().
  Wait for task.
  Return "done".

cases.name: version-import
cases.src:
Module test.vi.

Use risk.Scoring version 2 as Score.
Use Http as H.

Rule greet, produce Text:
  Return "hi".

cases.name: effect-capabilities
cases.src:
Module test.eff.

Rule fetch, produce Text. It performs io [Http]:
  Return Http.get("/x").

cases.name: pii
cases.src:
Module test.pii.

Rule secure given field as @pii(L2, email) Text, produce Text:
  Return field.

cases.name: pii-nested-list
cases.src:
Module test.pii_nested.

Rule collect given items as List of @pii(L2, email) Text, produce Text:
  Return "ok".

cases.name: deprecated-annotation
cases.src:
Module test.anno.

@deprecated
Rule oldRule, produce Text:
  Return "x".

cases.name: example-annotation
cases.src:
Module test.anno2.

@example
Rule demo, produce Text:
  Return "x".

cases.name: nested-workflow-in-if
cases.src:
Module test.nested_wf.

Rule process given flag as Bool, produce Text:
  If flag:
    Start task as async fetch().
    Return "async".
  Otherwise:
    Return "sync".

cases.name: stable-bare-io
cases.src:
Module test.stable_io.

Rule fetch, produce Text. It performs io:
  Return Http.get("/x").

cases.name: stable-entry
cases.src:
Module test.stable_entry.

@entry
Rule main, produce Text:
  Return "x".

cases.name: stable-plain
cases.src:
Module test.pure_stable.

Rule greet given name as Text, produce Text. It performs io:
  Return name.

cases.name: pii-return-type
cases.src:
Module test.ret_pii.

Rule getEmail, produce @pii(L2, email) Text:
  Return "user@example.com".

cases.name: pii-param-and-return
cases.src:
Module test.pii_both.

Rule process given raw as @pii(L1, name) Text, produce @pii(L2, email) Text:
  Return raw.
